current_life_events: Just moved into the new apartment and feeling overwhelmed by the empty space, struggling to find inspiration for new design projects, and received a comment from a friend about his weight gain.
mental_state: Feeling lost and uncertain about his identity, questioning his creativity and self-worth.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The recent move and comment from a friend have triggered body image concerns, while the transition to a new space and struggles with design work have exacerbated low self-esteem, social anxiety, and fears about his new life.
